tags.description: Crosses the douar; A paved road; Narrow, it should be widened; Absence of signs;
A track that enters the douar and to the fields to facilitate the transportation of crops.

Flood of Megoun Valley leads to blocking the road because there is no bridge. The valley isolates inhabitants from the secondary road and requires a connection to P1502; presents danger in winter; needs maintenance

tags.description: Hdida school district annex; No sports or sanitary facilities or library, new desks, multimedia room; It has 3 classrooms, 2 concrete and 1 in need of maintenance; Connected to electricity and drinking water; Surrounded by concrete wall
